description:
You are a Release Engineer for TailwindTraders preparing the codebase for the v2.1.0 release. From the 'main' branch, create a new branch named 'release/v2.1'. In this branch, update 'package.json' to change the version from '2.1.0-beta' to '2.1.0' and update 'app-config.json' to change the environment from 'staging' to 'production'. Create a Pull Request to merge 'release/v2.1' into 'main' with the title 'Release v2.1.0'.

Login credentials:
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
